tools.name: kdp_lookup
tools.description: KDP/Amazon competitive data: BSR, pricing, review counts, niche score. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: transcribe_youtube
tools.description: YouTube video -> structured transcript + timestamped summary. $0.10/call via x402.

tools.name: extract_pdf
tools.description: Structured PDF extraction from base64-encoded PDF bytes. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: company_lookup
tools.description: Company enrichment from a domain: name, description, logo, social links, contact emails/phones. $0.01/call via x402.

tools.name: profile_lookup
tools.description: X (Twitter) or LinkedIn public profile lookup: name, bio, followers, company, experience. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: web_read
tools.description: Extract clean readable text from any webpage, boilerplate stripped. $0.02/call via x402.

tools.name: email_verify
tools.description: Verify an email address: syntax, MX records, disposable/role detection -> valid|risky|invalid. $0.01/call via x402.

tools.name: crypto_price
tools.description: FREE: live crypto/FX price from Chainlink oracles on Base (ETH, BTC, SOL, DOGE, AVAX, LINK, USDC, EUR vs USD). No payment needed.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: web_read · Private data: company_lookup, email_verify · Public sink: email_verify.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: web_read · Private data: company_lookup, email_verify · Public sink: email_verify

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
